scripts.version:patch: pnpm run version:pre && pnpm run version:changelog && pnpm version patch && pnpm run version:post
scripts.version:minor: pnpm run version:pre && pnpm run version:changelog && pnpm version minor && pnpm run version:post
scripts.version:major: pnpm run version:pre && pnpm run version:changelog && pnpm version major && pnpm run version:post
scripts.version:pre: if [ $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) != 'master' ]; then echo "\033[1m\033[31mCurrently on $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) branch. Please checkout master.\033[0m"; exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.version:changelog: changelog -p && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m 'updated CHANGELOG.md'
scripts.version:post: git push origin master && git push origin master --tags
scripts.build-release:patch: react-scripts test --watchAll=false && pnpm run build && pnpm run version:patch
scripts.build-release:minor: react-scripts test --watchAll=false && pnpm run build && pnpm run version:minor
scripts.build-release:major: react-scripts test --watchAll=false && pnpm run build && pnpm run version:major
